allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('@sanity/image-url/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', pkg.version\); console.log\('exports:', Object.keys\(pkg.exports || {}\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('siteSettings:', bool\(d['result'].get\('siteSettings'\)\)\); print\('about:', bool\(d['result'].get\('about'\)\)\); print\('services:', len\(d['result'].get\('services',[]\)\), 'items'\); print\('products:', len\(d['result'].get\('products',[]\)\), 'items'\); print\('gallery:', len\(d['result'].get\('gallery',[]\)\), 'items'\); print\('advantages:', len\(d['result'].get\('advantages',[]\)\),'items'\)")

Bash(curl -s "https://77e5oip8.apicdn.sanity.io/v2023-05-03/data/query/production" --data-urlencode 'query={"siteSettings": *[_type == "siteSettings"][0]{...,header{...,favicon{asset->{url}}}},"about": *[_type == "about"][0],"services": *[_type == "service"] | order\(_createdAt asc\),"products": *[_type == "product"] | order\(_createdAt asc\),"gallery": *[_type == "gallery"] | order\(_createdAt asc\),"advantages": *[_type == "advantage"] | order\(_createdAt asc\)}')
